domain: Reasoning Distillation Platforms for Small Models

dedicated_distillation_toolkits.name: EasyDistill (ModelScope/Alibaba)
dedicated_distillation_toolkits.description: Comprehensive KD toolkit for LLMs supporting black-box and white-box distillation, CoT operators for reasoning, data synthesis, SFT, ranking optimization, and RL. Supports System 1 and System 2 cognitive models.

dedicated_distillation_toolkits.name: NVIDIA TensorRT Model Optimizer
dedicated_distillation_toolkits.description: Unified library for quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding. Combines structured weight pruning with knowledge distillation. Outputs to TensorRT-LLM, vLLM, SGLang.

dedicated_distillation_toolkits.name: HuggingFace TRL (GKD Trainer)
dedicated_distillation_toolkits.description: Transformer Reinforcement Learning library with Generalized Knowledge Distillation (GKD) trainer, GRPO support, SFT, DPO. GKD integrates distillation with RL fine-tuning.

dedicated_distillation_toolkits.name: OpenRLHF
dedicated_distillation_toolkits.description: High-performance RLHF framework built on Ray, vLLM, ZeRO-3. 3.1x faster than TRL. Supports PPO, DPO, GRPO for reasoning model training.

fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.name: OpenAI Distillation API
fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.description: Distills from o1-preview/GPT-4o to GPT-4o-mini. Three components: Stored Completions, Evals, Fine-tuning. Closed ecosystem.

fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.name: Predibase
fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.description: LoRA fine-tuning platform with Turbo LoRA (2-3x inference speedup), LoRAX multi-adapter serving, reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) for reasoning models.

fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.name: Together AI Fine-Tuning
fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.description: Fine-tuning API for open-source models. Reasoning clusters for token-heavy workloads. Up to 110 tokens/sec on reasoning clusters.

fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.name: Fireworks AI Fine-Tuning
fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.description: Supervised fine-tuning with reasoning_content support in multi-turn conversations. Serverless and on-demand deployment.

fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.name: Anyscale Fine-Tuning
fine_tuning_platforms_with_distillation.description: Supports causal LM, instruction tuning, DPO, continuous pre-training, and model distillation on Ray infrastructure.

open_source_training_frameworks.name: Unsloth
open_source_training_frameworks.description: Memory-efficient training framework. GRPO with 80% less VRAM than HF+FA2. Train reasoning models with 5GB VRAM. QLoRA/LoRA GRPO support. Unsloth Studio web UI.

open_source_training_frameworks.name: Axolotl
open_source_training_frameworks.description: Streamlined post-training for LLMs. Supports full fine-tuning, LoRA, QLoRA, GPTQ, DPO, IPO, KTO, ORPO, GRPO, GDPO, Reward Modelling, PRM.

open_source_training_frameworks.name: LMFlow
open_source_training_frameworks.description: Extensible toolkit for finetuning and inference of large foundation models. LoRA, FlashAttention, Gradient Checkpointing, DeepSpeed Zero3.

open_source_training_frameworks.name: LLaMA-Factory
open_source_training_frameworks.description: Easy fine-tuning framework supporting 100+ LLMs with web UI. SFT, RLHF, DPO support.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: DASD (Distribution-Aligned Sequence Distillation)
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Fully open-source reasoning model achieving SOTA at 4B scale. Uses 448K training samples. Distribution-aligned approach for long-CoT reasoning.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: DLCoT (Deconstructing Long Chain-of-Thought)
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Distillation data enhancement: data segmentation, simplification, optimization of intermediate error states for long CoT.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: UniCoTT
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Unified teacher-student distillation framework for transferring diverse structural CoTs from LLMs to SLMs.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: CoT-Evo (Evolutionary CoT Distillation)
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Evolutionary framework that performs intra-chain aggregation to synthesize high-quality reasoning chains from multiple CoTs.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: DC-CoT Benchmark
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Data-centric benchmark for investigating how data augmentation, selection, and mixing influence CoT distillation efficacy.

research_frameworks_and_methods.name: REDI (Reinforcement Distillation)
research_frameworks_and_methods.description: Two-stage framework: Stage 1 learns from positive traces via SFT, Stage 2 refines using both positive and negative traces.

pre_distilled_model_families.name: DeepSeek-R1 Distilled Series
pre_distilled_model_families.description: 800K reasoning samples from R1 used to distill Qwen2.5 and Llama3 models at 1.5B, 7B, 8B, 14B, 32B, 70B sizes. SFT only, no RL stage needed.

pre_distilled_model_families.name: Sky-T1 (NovaSky/UC Berkeley)
pre_distilled_model_families.description: Open-recipe 7B math reasoning model. 4-step SFT->RL->SFT->RL pipeline from Qwen2.5-Math-7B. Only 5K distilled samples from QwQ teacher. Cost <$450.

pre_distilled_model_families.name: Llamba (Cartesia/Cornell)
pre_distilled_model_families.description: Distills Llama-3.x into Mamba-2 recurrent architecture. 12x higher throughput. Optimized for Apple MLX and on-device deployment.

pre_distilled_model_families.name: NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Nano
pre_distilled_model_families.description: Unified model for reasoning and non-reasoning tasks. Generates reasoning traces before final responses.

on_device_and_edge.name: Apple MLX + Core ML
on_device_and_edge.description: On-device LLM inference on Apple Silicon. Unified memory architecture. Supports quantized distilled models like Llamba.

on_device_and_edge.name: PRISM (Robot Planning SLM Distillation)
on_device_and_edge.description: Distills LLM-enabled robot planners into compact SLMs using synthetic task/environment data.

market_signals.deepseek_r1_watershed: January 2025 - proved small distilled models can match frontier reasoning
market_signals.distillation_attacks: Anthropic, Google reported industrial-scale distillation attacks from Chinese AI labs in 2025-2026
market_signals.open_source_surge: EasyDistill, Unsloth GRPO, TRL GKD all released/updated in 2025
market_signals.cost_reduction: Sky-T1 trained for <$450; TeichAI distilled frontier models for $52
market_signals.vram_democratization: Unsloth enables reasoning model training with 5GB VRAM
